description_long: This is a large, heavy-duty safe box with a rectangular, industrial design and a weathered, greenish-gray painted exterior. The surface is marked by significant patches of rust and chipped paint, especially along the edges and corners, indicating prolonged exposure to harsh conditions or age. The front face features a prominent circular combination dial, a horizontal handle, and two robust external hinges on the right, all made of metal. There is also a small, rectangular metal plate above the locking mechanism, possibly for branding or instructions, and a geometric metal fixture to the left of the dial. The other sides of the box are plain, with only rust and paint wear visible, and no additional openings or features. The safe box is constructed primarily from thick steel, designed to be highly secure and resistant to tampering, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, storage rooms, or industrial facilities.
description: A large, weathered steel safe box with a greenish-gray, rusted exterior, featuring a combination dial, handle, and external hinges on the front. The sides and back are plain, showing only chipped paint and rust.
description_view_0: The left side of the safe box, showing extensive rust and chipped paint along the edges, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_1: The front of the safe box, displaying a circular combination dial, a horizontal handle, two external right-side hinges, a metal plate, and a geometric fixture, all set against a rusted, greenish-gray surface.
description_view_2: The right side of the safe box, similar to the left, with visible rust and chipped paint but no handles or openings.
description_view_3: The back of the safe box, plain and featureless except for rust and paint wear along the edges and corners.
attribute_handle_design: horizontal bar handle, centrally placed below the dial, metallic
attribute_brand_or_manufacturer_label: rectangular metal plate above the dial, engraved text, details not fully legible
